features: Presented in a beautiful gift box
300ml body wash, 300ml bath milk, 150g soap, 130ml body polish, 130ml body lotion and 100g bath soak crystals leaves skin feeling gently cleansed
130ml Body Lotion ensures skin is moisturised and delicately fragranced
description: Product Description An impressive gift box containing luxurious 300ml body wash, 300ml bath milk, 150g soap, 130ml shower crème, 130ml body lotion and 100g bath soak crystals. Feminine blends of jojoba, rich vanilla and sweet almond oil characterise this beautifully opulent collection. Inspired by trending astrological beauty aesthetics, our Jojoba, Vanilla & Almond oil collection is brought to life through sustainable metallics, multi-faceted shimmers and a celestial colour palette of frosted pink and warm peach, complimented with a holographic foil. Glamourous and luxurious, our most indulgent fragrance. Gentle notes of vanilla have been blended with subtle notes of almond oil and the sweetness of jojoba to create a truly sensuous and alluring fragrance. Ingredients Body Wash: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Vanillin.Bath Milk: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycol Distearate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Vanillin.Soap: Sodium Palmate, Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Palm Kernelate, Glycerin, Sodium Chloride, Parfum (Fragrance), Tetrasodium Edta, Tetrasodium Etidronate, Titanium Dioxide (Ci 77891), Vanillin.Body Polish: Aqua (Water, Eau), Peg-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Silica, Carbomer, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum (Fragrance), Chlorphenesin, Benzyl Alcohol, Sodium Hydroxide, Vanillin.Body Lotion: Aqua (Water, Eau), Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Peg-100 Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Coumarin, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Vanillin.Bath Soak Crystals: Sodium Chloride, Parfum (Fragrance), Benzophenone-4, Vanillin. Directions Apply to wet skin, lather, and rinse. Use daily or as needed. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. See more
